You need to accomplish two things in this phase:
1. Profile the uploaded raw CSV files to understand their structure, column semantics, data quality, and potential join keys across datasets.

args.goal: Profile the uploaded raw CSV files (products.csv, sales_data.csv, stores.csv) to understand their structure, column semantics, data quality, and potential join keys. The output profile will be used to generate the Bronze STTM.

Generate a Bronze STTM from the previously created data profile. The STTM should cover every column from the raw CSV files with ingestion rules, including column renames, type casting, and metadata injection. Bronze is intent-agnostic, so map all columns mechanically.
